seoTitle: Chatswood vs Chatswood West — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Chatswood and Chatswood West. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Chatswood vs Chatswood West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Chatswood and Chatswood West.
heading: Chatswood vs Chatswood West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Chatswood, New South Wales and Chatswood West, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chatswood has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Chatswood West (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Chatswood or Chatswood West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Chatswood has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Chatswood West scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Chatswood scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Chatswood West scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Chatswood or Chatswood West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chatswood has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
